rag_rules: Place input assumptions in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
Use assign only for output features or auxiliary variables in implementation annexes
Avoid range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean, enumeration-like, or opaque data ports unless the requirement and AADL data representation provide a numeric scalar
generic_rules: Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
